channel.title: Cloud-Storage on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud-Storage on ivomarino.com

item.title: S3 Bucket Backups with Restic: Automating Cloud Storage Replication
item.description: S3 buckets aren’t backups. Secure them with independent snapshots using rclone FUSE mounting and restic deduplication. 500GB of production buckets compressed to 100GB with 80% savings. Includes automation, configuration, and real operational procedures for 2-3 hour backup windows.
